detail: Settings language changes are guarded against recursive re-entry.
Shell menu/topbar refresh is deferred outside the combo-box signal stack.
MainWindow language state is updated before menu rebuild.
Login language combo changes are guarded as well.
Global exception hook installation is idempotent.
RecursionError is routed to Python's original hook without wrapper recursion.
French translation reload has a re-entry guard and runtime save labels.
